issues_created.49: wgpu backend architecture and implementation plan

notes: 2026-04-16: Task 1 — Confirmed no new human activity on any open issue since 2026-04-15. Task 10 — Investigated escape key / cancel-edit flow for TodoMVC per-item inline editing. KEY FINDING: InputAction::Escape → HandleKeyResult::Blur is ALREADY FULLY WIRED in text_state.rs:799; both playground.rs (line 914) and todomvc.rs (lines 471-475) already handle Blur for their existing TextEditState instances. Missing for per-item inline editing: (1) editing_id: Option<usize> field in TodoApp; (2) editing_state: TextEditState field in TodoApp; (3) key event routing: when editing_id.is_some(), route to editing_state instead of new_todo_state; (4) Escape=discard (editing_id = None), Enter/Submit=save (save content, editing_id = None); (5) click-outside=save; (6) empty edit removes item (TodoMVC spec). Double-click entry requires PR #36 (click_count()); alt: F2 or Edit button. ~95-120 lines in todomvc.rs, zero new deps. Task 11 — Updated Monthly Activity Summary. Next priorities: task_3_improvements (oldest: 2026-03-24), task_7_labels (2026-04-10), task_5_maintain_prs (2026-04-14).

dep_audit_2026_03_29.notes: All deps resolving to current patch versions. No urgent updates needed. accesskit_winit 0.32.0 declared but still unused — needs wiring. No wgpu in lockfile (not yet a dep).

escape_key_cancel_edit_investigation_202.infrastructure_status: ALREADY WIRED — InputAction::Escape → HandleKeyResult::Blur in text_state.rs:799; playground.rs:914 and todomvc.rs:471-475 already handle Blur
missing_for_per_item_editing: editing_id: Option<usize> field in TodoApp struct
editing_state: TextEditState field in TodoApp struct
Key event routing: when editing_id.is_some(), route to editing_state
Submit handler: save content to todos[idx].text, editing_id = None
Click-outside handler: save changes, editing_id = None
Double-click entry point: requires PR #36 click_count() accessor

inputhandler_ime_investigation_2026_04_0.status: COMPLETE PICTURE — zero new dependencies needed. TextEditState already has marked_range: Option<Range<usize>> field and undo/redo skip during composition. Missing: public setter, InputHandler trait, UTF-16 conversion utils (~60-100 lines), WindowEvent::Ime handler in playground.rs (winit 0.30 provides ImeEvent::Preedit/Commit but playground.rs has no Ime match arm). ~600-750 lines total for complete implementation. Deferred until PR backlog clears.
key_gaps: No public set_marked_range() method on TextEditState
No WindowEvent::Ime arm in playground.rs window_event match

clipboard_investigation_2026_04_02.status: COMPLETE PICTURE — zero new dependencies needed. objc2-app-kit already in motif_core with features=["NSView","NSWindow"]; add NSPasteboard feature. Create motif_core::clipboard with read()->Option<String> and write(text:&str) using NSPasteboard::generalPasteboard(). Both playground.rs:917-925 and todomvc.rs:480-484 have // TODO: Clipboard stubs. HandleKeyResult::Copy(String)/Cut(String)/Paste already defined. TextEditState::paste(&str) and cut_selected_text() already implemented. ~20 lines total. Strong candidate for next PR when backlog clears.

accesskit_integration_2026_03_26.status: COMPLETE PICTURE — all data structures implemented, wiring plan finalized. App struct needs 3 fields: access_tree: AccessTree, focus_mgr: FocusManager, access_context: Option<accesskit_winit::AccessKitWinitContext>. resumed(): init context after window creation with initial TreeUpdate from access_tree.build_initial_update(). window_event(): on each frame, call adapter.update_if_active(|| build_update()); on focus changes call adapter directly. Elements push AccessNode during draw with bounds set. ~30 lines total across examples. accesskit_winit = '0.32' already in Cargo.toml — zero new deps needed.

animation_primitives_2026_03_26.status: DESIGN COMPLETE — no animation code exists. Simplest: struct Animation { start: Instant, duration: Duration } with .progress() -> f32 { (elapsed / duration).clamp(0,1) }. Color lerp via palette (already in workspace). Easing as pure functions (cubic, quad, sine — no deps). No new deps needed. Deferred until PR backlog clears.
